channels.name: Hfz. Adnan Mrkonjic — Nauči Arapski
channels.subtitle: Strukturirani kurs arapskog na bosanskom
channels.descriptionBs: Jedini sveobuhvatni strukturirani kurs arapskog jezika na bosanskom jeziku na YouTubeu. Hafiz Adnan Mrkonjić studirao je arapski u Kuvajtu i predavao u arapskim zemljama. Gramatički pristup s kur'anskim primjerima. 3 nivoa: 78 + 65 + 63 lekcije.
channels.descriptionEn: The only comprehensive structured Arabic course in Bosnian on YouTube. Instructor Hafiz Adnan Mrkonjic studied in Kuwait and taught in the Arab world. Grammar-first approach with Quranic examples. 3 levels: 78 + 65 + 63 lessons.

channels.name: Learn Arabic with Khasu
channels.subtitle: MSA-only structured lessons
channels.descriptionBs: Jedan od najboljih YouTube kanala isključivo za modernostandardni arapski (fusha). Predavač iz Čečenije, studirao u Jordanu. Jasan, praktičan, moderan pristup. Video za početnike ima 8,3 miliona pregleda.
channels.descriptionEn: One of the best MSA-only YouTube channels. Creator from Chechnya, studied in Jordan, holds a degree in Sharia. Exclusively Fusha — no dialects. Clear, practical, modern approach. Top beginner video has 8.3M views.
